programme.title: United States vs Bosnia-Herzegovina - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Round Of 32
programme.desc: This will be the fourth meeting between USA and Bosnia and Herzegovina, with the Stars and Stripes unbeaten in the first three, all in friendlies from 2013 to 2021.
